method: img-2 generated the complete unified visual. The current DailyDoseOfDay playlist screenshots were used only as loose visual/content references, not as pasted source layers.
postprocess: Resized from the img-2 native output to 1080x1920 with no cropping, local compositing, or text overlay.
privacy_rule: Private or account-like plugins are represented as locked/blurred concept tiles; do not expose real portfolio values, printer details, usernames, account identifiers, or private profile data.
prompt_text: 少刷屏  少泄露  少折腾
